items.label: SpaceX
items.headline: SpaceX Stock Edges Higher Today as Investors Brace for Historic Nasdaq-100 Entry Just 15 Days After IPO
items.summary: SpaceX shares rise as the company prepares for rapid inclusion in the Nasdaq-100 index, following a volatile post-IPO period. Investors anticipate increased demand from index funds.

items.label: SpaceX
items.headline: SpaceX Stock Steadies Near $153 as $25 Billion Bond Sale Draws Record $89 Billion From Investors Worldwide
items.summary: SpaceX's stock stabilised after a volatile IPO month, driven by a massive bond offering and new contract wins, despite ongoing financial challenges and divided analyst opinions.
